Build your device

Surface Pro for Business, Copilot+ PC, 12-inch | Snapdragon

4 images

Surface Pro for Business, Copilot+ PC, 12-inch | Snapdragon

  • This Copilot+ PC1 is preloaded with Windows 11 Pro. Learn more

This was added to your wishlist.

You added Surface Pro for Business, Copilot+ PC - Snapdragon® X Plus (8 Core), Platinum, 24GB RAM, 1TB SSD to your wish list. You can share this list with others.

View wish list
The lightest and most flexible Copilot+ PC¹ empowers you to save time and achieve more. Power your productivity with Snapdragon® X Plus processors and use your device with touch, voice, pen,² and Surface Pro 12-inch Keyboard for Business.² Industry leading Microsoft chip-to-cloud security keeps your data safe for peace of mind.

Why buy from Microsoft Store

We offer free 2-3 day shipping, 60-day returns, and one-on-one product expert help in finding the best solution for your small business.  If you buy a physical product and we lower the price within 60 days from delivery, contact us and we’ll refund you the difference.  Terms apply.
Learn more

Up to $900 cash back with trade-in

For a limited time, buy a Surface Pro for Business, Copilot+ PC and get extra cash back with an eligible trade-in.
Learn more

Starting From $1,249.99

Business financing available. Spread out the cost of your purchase with low monthly payments.
Get started

Build your device

Sign in or create a work account now to get easy access to exclusive business discounts. Why sign in before shopping?

Using your work account now makes shopping easier. Learn more.

Items added before signing in will go into your personal cart. Signing in with your work account lets you add items directly to your business cart without having to start over.

Free 2-3 day shipping. Free returns.

Need Surface for Business at enterprise scale?
Find authorized resellers

For special business pricing, purchase with Purchase Order, or additional sales support, call us at 1 855-270-0615, Monday to Friday, 6:00 AM to 6:00 PM PT.

Overview Tech specs Sustainability Accessibility Compare

Versatile 2-in-1 design with impressive performance

Power through tough tasks

Snapdragon® X Plus processors deliver incredible performance to help you tackle whatever the day throws your way.

Enjoy up to 16 hours of battery

Power productivity with all-day battery.3 Support for fast charging recharges your battery in a snap with 45W charger via USB-C®.4

Accelerate AI experiences

Enable Copilot+ PC AI experiences on your device with the Qualcomm® Hexagon™ NPU with 45 TOPS.

Enjoy incredible image quality

The 12-inch PixelSense™ display5 features adaptive color and contrast for truer, more consistent viewing.

Smoother scrolling and inking

A refresh rate of up to 90Hz keeps you in your flow when inking with Slim Pen2 or scrolling websites.

More screen space

A 3:2 aspect ratio display and the thinnest bezels from our 2-in-1 devices give you more screen real estate.

See better in any lighting

Integrated anti-reflective technology reduces screen reflections by up to 50%, for better viewing in any lighting.

Improved eye comfort

The display has been tested to be flicker-free and reduce blue light exposure, which can help reduce eye strain.6

Interact your way

Navigate your device through touch, voice, keyboard and mouse, or pen.2 High-quality microphones allow for dictation, and multi-touch screens enhance the accessibility experiences available in Windows 11 Pro.

Flexibility at any angle

The built in 165-degree fluid kickstand allows for easy adjustment of the device’s angle and position, ideal for those who need to fit their device in different workspaces, for example, mounted to a wheelchair.7

Built-in pen storage

Sketch, draw, and take notes  with Slim Pen,2 which attaches securely and charges in the built-in pen storage on the back of 12-inch Surface Pro for Business.

Turn Pro into a full laptop

Surface Pro 12-inch Keyboard for Business2 features a new smooth-matte palm rest, a full-size backlit keyset, and spacious precision touchpad for more comfortable typing and scrolling.

Ultralight and ultradurable

Take your thin, lightweight device on the go, with a design that’s been tested for durability.8

Quieter for better focusing

A fanless design keeps your device cool while reducing dust accumulation, which can improve performance and longevity over time.

Dock and connect to accessories

Elevate your desktop setup by connecting up to two 4K external monitors at 60Hz with compatible docks. Two USB-C® 3.2 ports support accessories and quick data transfers.

Fast, reliable wireless connections

Enhance productivity with lightning-fast speeds, ultra-low latency, and stable, secure connections with Wi-Fi 79 and Bluetooth® Core 5.4.

Built for security, designed for trust

Out-of-the-box security

12-inch Surface Pro for Business is a Secured-core PC, designed to elevate the benefits of Windows 11 Pro security, providing additional hardware and software protection.

Protect against evolving threats

Windows is secure by default, with layers of hardware-backed protection and a reported 62% drop in security incidents.10

Secure passwordless sign-in

Sign in instantly and securely without a password using an integrated NFC reader or Windows Hello with facial recognition, which can help prevent phishing and credential-based attacks.

Built-in protection against attacks

Microsoft Pluton is built-in security that protects your credentials, identities, personal data, and encryption keys against attacks.

Safeguard your data

BitLocker ensures hardware-level encryption, rendering data on lost or stolen devices inaccessible.

Enhanced Copilot+ PC AI experiences

Better video calling

Enhance the HD front-facing Surface Studio Camera with AI-powered Windows Studio Effects. Capture photos and 4K videos with the 10MP Ultra HD rear-facing camera, then edit them with AI tools.

Always stay centered on video calls

Automatic Framing keeps you in focus, in the center of your video call, even as you move around your space.

Communicate effectively in meetings

Combat video fatigue by choosing from creative filters that convey your mood and personality, and enhance your video calls.

Be heard more clearly

Enhanced voice focus removes background noise for maximum clarity on calls and lets the Studio Mics focus on your voice.14

Reduce visual distractions

Background blur activates real-time background blurring to maintain the emphasis on the speaker, minimizing visual noise.

Bring focus to meetings

Portrait blur tunes the background blur effect to your surroundings and uses depth-based sensing to bring focus to you.

Improve your call quality

Super Resolution in Teams uses local AI processing on the NPU to enhance the quality of video calls even in low-bandwidth scenarios.

Boost call engagement

Eye contact technology helps you appear focused and connected with your audience, even while consulting notes.

Enhance your lighting

Portrait light adjusts to neutralize unusual color casts or harsh lighting, ensuring a consistent and natural look in any setting.

Reduce language barriers

Enable Live Captions with translation from more than 40 languages into English. Live Captions display when someone is talking in live or recorded audio in any app on Windows.11

Turn your ideas into images

Simply input a description and start sketching with Surface Slim Pen,2 and watch Cocreator12 generate an interpretation of it.

Break through creative blocks

In Photos, Restyle Image adapts your art in any style.12

Inspire your creativity

With Image Creator, simply describe what you want to create and scroll through photos.12

Uncover solutions quickly with Microsoft Copilot

Achieve more with less time and effort

Copilot can help you find the answers you need, summarize important points, and compare, analyze, and visualize your data. Windows 11 Pro business AI and features increase workflow speed by 50% on average.13

Get more when you add Microsoft 365 Copilot

Effortless communication

Microsoft 365 Copilot in Teams helps you track discussions in real time and produce conversation summaries after your calls end.

Jumpstart your creative process

Copilot in Word transforms your writing, helping you create a draft from other docs, rewrite sections, and summarize text.

Manage your email more effectively

Copilot in Outlook provides personalized suggestions, summaries, and insights to help you stay organized and save time.  

Bring your ideas to life

Copilot transforms documents into PowerPoint decks with speaker notes and sources, and creates presentations from prompts.

Explore data with ease

Analyze, comprehend, identify trends, and visualize data with Copilot in Excel.

Automate workflows with ease

With Microsoft Copilot Studio, you can build your own Copilot to automate workflows and serve employees and customers.

Respond quickly to threats

Microsoft Security Copilot is a natural language, AI-powered security analysis tool that works with Microsoft security products.

Microsoft protection plans for added peace of mind

With several different plans to choose from, you can get the coverage you need, from mechanical breakdowns to accidental damage, with extended coverage and technical support.

Why shop at Microsoft Store for your business

Consider us your go-to specialists for Microsoft products and services. Whether you’re a company of three or 300, our product experts can help you find the right Microsoft devices, software, and resources to meet your goals and grow your business.
Learn more

Do more and save with your free work account​

Get easy access to exclusive business discounts and simplified account management with a shopping experience built for business.​
Learn more

Fast shipping and free returns

Enjoy free 2-3 day shipping with no minimum purchase required. Plus, get free 60-day returns on almost any physical product.
Some exclusions apply.*
See shipping details Learn about returns

60-day price protection

Buy now, enjoy price protection for 60 days from your delivery date. If we drop the price of a select physical product, contact us and we’ll honor a one-time price adjustment.
﻿﻿﻿﻿Exclusions apply.*
Learn more about price protection

Work worry-free with extended coverage

Accidents happen but business must go on. Avoid unplanned setbacks and expenses, with up to 4 years coverage when you purchase one of our Microsoft protection plans.
Learn about protection plans

Frequently asked questions

|

  • A Copilot+ PC is a PC built for AI experiences, with a powerful NPU that can run AI tasks on the device. This helps enable faster, more efficient AI features while keeping work moving smoothly, even when you’re multitasking or on the go.

  • Yes. Some Surface models come with 5G, but not all Surface devices include cellular connectivity. If you want 5G, make sure you choose a configuration that specifically lists 5G support. 

    5G-enabled Surface devices work with a mobile data plan using either a physical SIM card (nano SIM) or eSIM, depending on the model. 

  • You can buy Surface business Pros directly from Microsoft Store. Availability of business laptop financing and payment options may vary by region and seller, allowing organizations to choose purchasing options that fit their budget and procurement needs.

  • Surface Pro for Business stands out as one of the top laptops for business and personal use, delivering powerful performance, ultra-portability, and enterprise-grade security in a versatile 2-in-1 design. Built for professionals on the go, it seamlessly replaces both a tablet and a laptop. Powered by Qualcomm Snapdragon® processors and Windows 11 Pro, it supports touch, pen, and keyboard workflows with reliable, manageable performance for work and everyday tasks.

  • Surface Pro for Business is a lightweight business laptop that’s easy to bring anywhere. It comes with Windows 11 Pro and runs Microsoft Office apps and other productivity tools, so you can stay on top of work without being weighed down. With its portable 2-in-1 design and strong performance, it’s a great option if you’re looking for a lightweight business laptop.

  • Intel and Qualcomm processors differ mainly in architecture and efficiency. Intel Core Ultra processors are widely used in traditional Windows PCs and are known for broad software compatibility and performance. Qualcomm Snapdragon® processors use ARM technology, prioritizing power efficiency and battery life. Both run Windows, but they can deliver different performance, battery, and feature experiences depending on the device.

  • LCD (Liquid Crystal Display) screens use a backlight to display images with consistent brightness and sharp resolution, making them well suited for everyday tasks like email, web browsing, document work, and video calls. OLED (Organic Light Emitting Diode) screens light each pixel individually to display images with deeper blacks, higher contrast, and support for HDR, making them a step up for creative work, media viewing, and immersive content.

  • Yes. On Surface devices running Windows 11 Pro, you can manage Copilot and AI experiences in Windows Settings, including hiding Copilot from the taskbar and adjusting privacy settings for your device. You can choose which experiences you use, so you stay in control.

  • Recall is available on Copilot+ PCs. If you’re shopping, confirm the device is labeled Copilot+ PC, since standard Windows 11 PCs don’t include Recall. Availability can vary by market/region, and you may need the latest Windows updates to see it on your device.

  • Check the app’s system requirements or product page and look for ARM64 support. Many Windows apps can also run on ARM devices using emulation, but a native ARM64 version may offer improved performance and efficiency. Review Microsoft’s Windows on Arm guidance for more information. 

  • Consumer Surface devices are designed for personal use, while Surface for Business models are built for work environments and come with Windows 11 Pro preinstalled. Business devices may also offer business only configurations such as 5G, extended warranty and service options, and enhanced support for security and IT management, including easier deployment, device controls, and long term support for organizations.

  • Contact Microsoft Support to troubleshoot the issue, check your warranty coverage, and submit a repair or service request. From there, you can select your device, review service options, and track repair status or order details to get back up and running quickly.

  • Surface Pro supports two detachable keyboard options. The Pro 13-inch Flex Keyboard works attached or detached, giving you greater freedom to present, sketch, or move around while staying productive. The Pro 13-inch Keyboard is designed to stay attached, delivering a stable, laptop like typing experience for focused work. Both include backlit keys, precision trackpads, and built in pen storage to match different work styles.

  • First, find your device model in Settings > System > About (Surface users can also check the Surface app). Then review the accessory’s product page under Specs, Compatibility, or Works with to confirm it supports your model. For some accessories, also check fit (screen size) or connection type (USB-C, Bluetooth, etc.).

  • Yes. Microsoft Store offers flexible payment options for eligible purchases, including installment plans and pay-over-time options where available. To use one, select an eligible item, add it to your cart, and—if offered—choose a payment plan during checkout to split your purchase into manageable payments.

*See Microsoft Store Price Protection for full terms and full list of eligible retailers. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.

Returns: Available with eligible physical products purchased from Microsoft Store online and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets. Return process must be started within 60 days after customer receives the product. Limit 5 product returns per eligible customer purchase. Excludes ROG Xbox Ally X, ROG Xbox Ally, Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit.

Applicable return policy applies. For purchases made at Microsoft Store, see applicable Microsoft Terms of Sale for more information. For purchases made at a Microsoft Experience Center, see receipt for more information. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.

Microsoft Store Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying physical consumer products and Surface for Business devices made at Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Price adjustments for Surface for Business devices can be made via credit card for purchases made on microsoft.com website only.

Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying new consumer physical products from Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Excludes ROG Xbox Ally, ROG Xbox Ally X, Surface for Business devices and accessories, and refurbished products. An Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment cannot be requested at time of purchase. Microsoft reserves the right to verify an eligible retailer’s advertised price and availability of the product. The product sold by the eligible retailer must be identical to the product sold by Microsoft and must be in stock for purchase at the eligible retailer at the reduced price. Exclusions apply. ​

Both price adjustments: Price adjustment must be requested within 60 days after the customer receives the product and cannot be completed at time of purchase. Customer is eligible only if the product is in stock for purchase at Microsoft Store or a Microsoft Experience Center. Customer must contact Microsoft to request the adjustment. For purchases from Microsoft Store, contact Microsoft Store Sales and Support and provide any information requested by a representative. For purchases from a Microsoft Experience Center, you must return to the location with your receipt. Limit 1 price adjustment per product. Excludes Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit.
[1] Copilot+ PC experiences vary by device and region and may require updates continuing to roll out through 2025; timing varies. See Copilot Plus PCs Frequently Asked Questions.
  • [2] Sold separately. Software license required for some features.
  • [3] Based on video playback test. Battery life varies significantly based on device configuration, usage, network and feature configuration, signal strength, settings and other factors. See Surface Battery Performance for details.
  • [4] In select markets, only specific configurations come with Surface 45W USB-C Wall Charger. Fast charging is supported with minimum 45 W USB Type-C® PD charger or higher. Testing conducted by Microsoft in March, 2025. For details on fast charging see - USB-C® and Fast charging for Surface - Microsoft Support.
  • [5] Surface Pro for Business, Copilot+ PC, 12-inch | Snapdragon display has rounded corners within a standard rectangle. When measured as a standard rectangular shape the screen is 12-inch diagonally (actual viewable area is less).
  • [6] Testing and certification has been performed by TÜV SÜD and only applies to Surface Pro for Business, Copilot+ PC, 12-inch | Snapdragon.
  • [7] Device mount required, sold separately.
  • [8] MIL-STD 810H establishes a methodology for testing products against environmental stresses under controlled laboratory conditions. Such testing is not a guarantee of future performance under these test conditions. Abuse, like that contained in MIL-STD 810H testing, is not covered under Microsoft’s standard warranty. Learn more at Surface hardware environmental test results.
  • [9] 6GHz band not available in all regions.
  • [10] Windows 11 Survey Report. Techaisle, September 2024. Windows 11 results are in comparison with Windows 10 devices.
  • [11] Translation for video and audio subtitles into English from 40+ languages Translation from 27 languages into Chinese (Simplified) coming later this year. See Copilot Plus PCs Frequently Asked Questions.
  • [12] Optimized for English text prompts. Requires Microsoft account and internet connection to access cloud services that help ensure the responsible use of AI. Learn more Use Copilot+ PC features in Paint - Microsoft Support.
  • [13] Compared to Windows 10 devices. Improve your day-to-day experience with Windows 11 Pro laptops. Principled Technologies, February 2023.
  • [14] Voice focus requires activation, requires Windows 11 and is available in apps which use integrated device microphones and use certain Windows audio processing modes.

Processor
Snapdragon® X Plus (8 Core)

NPU
Qualcomm® Hexagon™ with 45 TOPS

Graphic
Qualcomm® Adreno™ GPU

Memory and storage1
  • Memory options:  16GB, 24GB LPDDR5x RAM
  • Storage options:  256GB, 512GB, 1TB (UFS)

Display
  • Touchscreen: 12 inch PixelSense™ LCD display2
  • Resolution: 2196 x 1464 (220 PPI)
  • Aspect ratio: 3:2  
  • Contrast ratio: 1300:1  
  • Refresh rate: up to 90Hz (60Hz default)
  • Color profile: sRGB and Enhanced 
  • Individually color-calibrated display 
  • Adaptive color 
  • Adaptive contrast
  • Touch: 10-point multi-touch  
  • Strengthened glass display
  • Brightness:  
    • SDR: 400 nits maximum (typical)
  • Anti-reflective, ISO 9241-307 certified3

Size and Weight4,5
  • Length: 10.8 inch (274 mm)
  • Width: 7.47 inch (190 mm)
  • Height: 0.30 inch (7.8 mm)
  • Weight: 1.5 lbs (686 g)

Battery Life
  • Up to 16 hours of local video playback6
  • Up to 12 hours of active web usage7

Security
  • Enhanced security with Microsoft Pluton TPM 2.0 and BitLocker support
  • Windows 11 Secured-core PC
  • Windows Hello facial recognition with Enhanced Sign-in Security
  • NFC authentication

Cameras
  • Full HD front-facing Surface Studio Camera  
    • 1080p Full HD camera
  • Support for Windows Studio Effects with automatic framing, portrait blur, creative filters (illustrated, animated, watercolor), eye contact, and portrait light 
  • 10 MP Ultra HD rear-facing camera
  • Windows Hello face authentication camera with Enhanced Sign-in Security

Audio
  • Dual Studio Mics with enhanced voice focus8
  • 2 W stereo speakers with Dolby Atmos®9
  • Support for Bluetooth® LE Audio

Ports and charging
  • 2 X USB-C®/ USB 3.2 ports with support for:
  • Charging  
    • Data transfer
    • DisplayPort 1.4a with support up to 2 x 4k monitors @ 60 Hz
    • Surface Thunderbolt™ 4 Dock and other accessories
  • Supports fast charging with minimum 45W charger via USB-C®10
  • Surface Pro 12-inch Keyboard for Business connector 

Network and connectivity
  • Wi-Fi 711
  • Bluetooth® Core 5.4 technology

Pen & keyboard Compatibility12

Keyboard compatibility

  • Surface Pro 12-inch Keyboard for Business

Pen compatibility  

  • Designed for Surface Slim Pen (2nd Edition) 
  • Integrated storage and wireless charging for Surface Slim Pen located on the back of  Surface Pro for Business, Copilot+ PC 12-inch | Snapdragon
  • Supports haptic feedback with Surface Slim Pen
  • Supports Microsoft Pen Protocol (MPP)  

Software
  • Windows 11 Pro
  • Preloaded Microsoft 365 Apps13
  • Microsoft 365 Business Standard, Microsoft 365 Business Premium, or Microsoft 365 Apps 30-day trial14 

Accessibility
  • Optional bold keyset available on Surface Pro 12-inch Keyboard for Business15
  • Compatible with Surface Adaptive kit
  • Compatible with Microsoft adaptive accessories
  • Includes Windows Accessibility Features – Learn More  Accessibility Features | Microsoft Accessibility
  • Discover more Microsoft Accessible Devices & Products - Accessible Devices & Products for PC & Gaming | Assistive Tech Accessories - Microsoft Store

Sustainability
  • Surface Pro for Business, Copilot+ PC, 12-inch | Snapdragon is designed with sustainability in mind - see more on the Surface Pro, 12-inch Eco Profile

Recycled materials 

  • Enclosure is made with a minimum of 82.9% recycled content, including 100% recycled aluminum alloy and 100% recycled rare earth metals16
  • Battery cell contains 100% recycled cobalt17

Thoughtful packaging

  • 75% recycled content in wood-based fiber commercial packaging18
  • Paper-based, minimizing plastic use
  • 100% of our virgin paper sourced comes from responsibly managed forests19

Energy efficient

  • ENERGY STAR® certified
  • Registered EPEAT® Gold20

Repairability

  • Clear visual icons and built-in access to repair instructions21

Surface Trade-in

  • We make trade-in convenient and secure for our commercial customers in the U.S. at Microsoft Trade In Program

In 2020, Microsoft committed to becoming carbon negative, water positive and zero waste by 2030. Learn more about how we design with sustainability in mind at Microsoft Surface Sustainability

Serviceability

Replacement components include:21

  • Display module
  • Battery
  • Motherboard (including main processor, memory and storage)
  • Thermal module
  • USB-C® module
  • Microphone module
  • IR camera
  • Speakers
  • Enclosure (bucket)
  • Front camera
  • Rear camera
  • Power and volume buttons
  • Kickstand
  • Device entry kit

Exterior
  • Casing: Anodized aluminum
  • Colors: Platinum22
  • Physical Buttons: Volume, Power

Kickstand
Kickstand with 165 degrees full friction hinge

Sensors
  • Ambient color sensor
  • Accelerometer
  • Gyroscope
  • Magnetometer
  • NFC

What’s in the box
  • Surface Pro for Business, Copilot+ PC 12-inch | Snapdragon
  • USB-C® charging cable
  • Optional Surface 45 W USB-C Wall Charger
  • Quick Start Guide
  • Safety and warranty documents

Warranty23
1-year limited hardware warranty

Battery Capacities4
  • Battery Capacity Nominal (Wh) 38
  • Battery Capacity Min (Wh) 37
[1] System software uses significant storage space. Available storage is subject to change based on system software updates and apps usage. 1GB = 1 billion bytes. 1TB = 1,000 GB. See Surface Storage Options more details.
  • [2] Surface Pro for Business, Copilot+ PC, 12-inch | Snapdragon display has rounded corners within a standard rectangle. When measured as a standard rectangular shape the screen is 12 inch diagonally (actual viewable area is less).
  • [3] Surface Pro for Business, Copilot+ PC, 12-inch | Snapdragon display has been designed to minimize unwanted reflections and has been certified by TÜV SÜD to meet the requirements of ISO 9241-307. 
  • [4] Might vary depending on manufacturing processes.
  • [5] Weight not including Keyboard. 
  • [6] Based on local video playback test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in March 2025 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Pro for Business, Copilot+ PC, 12-inch | Snapdragon 256GB, 16GB RAM 1st Edition devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge during video playback of a .mov file through the Windows Media Player application in 1080p at 24 FPS. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [7] Based on a web browsing test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in March 2025 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Pro for Business, Copilot+ PC, 12-inch | Snapdragon 256GB, 16GB RAM 1st Edition devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge while accessing 12 popular websites over multiple open tabs through the browser. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-Brightness disabled.  Wi-Fi was connected to a network. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [8] Voice focus requires activation, requires Windows 11 and is available in apps which use integrated device microphones and use certain Windows audio processing modes. 
  • [9] Requires Dolby Atmos® encoded content/audio.
  • [10] In select markets, only specific configurations come with Surface 45 W USB-C Wall Charger. Fast charging is supported with minimum 45 W USB Type-C® PD charger or higher. Testing conducted by Microsoft in March 2025. For details on fast charging see - USB-C® and Fast Charging for Surface - Microsoft Support.
  • [11] 6GHz band not available in all regions.
  • [12] Pen and keyboard sold separately.
  • [13] Sold separately. Software license required for some features. 
  • [14] Activation required. If your device is managed by your organization’s IT department, contact your IT administrator for activation. After 30 days, you will be charged the applicable monthly or annual subscription fee. Credit card required. Cancel any time to stop future charges. See M365 Business Trial Info.
  • [15] Bold keyset option available only in US English in select markets.
  • [16] Enclosure includes bucket, kickstand, and pen tray. 100% recycled aluminum alloy in bucket. 100% recycled rare earth metals in magnets. Based on validation performed by Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP 2809-2, Second Edition, dated June 20, 2024.
  • [17] Excluding PSU. Contains 4.7% recycled cobalt, consisting of 100% recycled cobalt in the battery cell. Based on validation performed by Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL (ECVP)-2809-2, Second Edition, dated June 20, 2024. Recycled Content is defined in accordance with ISO 14021
  • [18] Applies to sales packaging. Based on internal analysis using IEEE Std 1680.1-2018. IEEE Standard for Environmental and Social Responsibility Assessment of Computers and Displays. 4.7.3.1 Required—Recycled content in wood-based fiber packaging.
  • [19] Sources must be Forest Stewardship Council certified.
  • [20] Please refer to the EPEAT registry for current ratings. Ratings can vary by country, may change over time, and products are eventually archived.

  • [21] Replacement components available through Surface Commercial authorized device resellers. Components can be replaced on-site by a skilled technician following Microsoft’s Service Guide. Microsoft tools (sold separately) may also be required. Availability of replacement components and service options may vary by product, market and over time. See Surface service options - Surface | Microsoft Learn.

    Opening and/or repairing your device can present electric shock, fire and personal injury risks and other hazards. Use caution if undertaking do-it-yourself repairs. Unless required by law, device damage caused during repair will not be covered under Microsoft’s Hardware Warranty or protection plans.
  • [22]  Colors available on selected models only. Available colors, sizes, finishes, and processors may vary by store, market, and configuration.
  • [23]  Microsoft’s Limited Warranty is in addition to your consumer law rights. 

Designed with sustainability in mind

Laptops designed by Microsoft with a commitment to responsible innovation. Learn more about sustainability at Surface.

Advancing sustainability in the supply chain

To meet our goal of 100% carbon-free electricity by 2030, 40% of our key device suppliers have already transitioned to carbon-free electricity in FY24, with more in progress.

Electric vehicle delivery

In FY24, we have expanded truckload electric vehicle capabilities to cover both of our United States distribution centers, enabling full truckloads within a 100-mile range of the distribution centers to be delivered via EV.

More recycled materials

12-inch Surface Pro for Business’s enclosure is made with a minimum of 82.9% recycled content, including 100% recycled aluminum alloy and 100% recycled rare earth metals.3

Thoughtful packaging

75% recycled content in wood-based fiber packaging.4

More energy efficient

Reduce your energy consumption with 12-inch Surface Pro for Business, an ENERGY STAR® certified device, 48.5% better than ENERGY STAR® limit.5

Serviceable by design

Major components in 12-inch Surface Pro for Business, including the motherboard, battery, cameras, and more are replaceable, which can help increase your return on investment.6

[1] Copilot+ PC experiences vary by device and region and may require updates continuing to roll out through 2025; timing varies. See Copilot Plus PCs Frequently Asked Questions.
  • [2] Sold separately. Software license required for some features.
  • [3] Enclosure includes bucket, kickstand, and pen tray. 100% recycled aluminum alloy in bucket. 100% recycled rare earth metals in magnets. Based on validation performed by Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP 2809-2, Second Edition, dated June 20, 2024.
  • [4] Applies to sales packaging. Based on internal analysis using IEEE Std 1680.1-2018. IEEE Standard for Environmental and Social Responsibility Assessment of Computers and Displays. 4.7.3.1 Required—Recycled content in wood-based fiber packaging.
  • [5] Computers that have earned the ENERGY STAR® label are third-party certified to be energy efficient and use 25% - 40% less than conventional models by using the most efficient components and better managing energy use when idle.
  • [6] Replacement components available through Surface Commercial authorized device resellers. Components can be replaced on-site by a skilled technician following Microsoft’s Service Guide. Microsoft tools (sold separately) may also be required. Availability of replacement components and service options may vary by product, market and over time. See Surface service options - Surface | Microsoft Learn. Opening and/or repairing your device can present electric shock, fire and personal injury risks and other hazards. Use caution if undertaking do-it-yourself repairs. Unless required by law, device damage caused during repair will not be covered under Microsoft’s Hardware Warranty or protection plans.

Designed with adaptability and versatility in mind

Through inclusive design and innovation, we strive to raise the bar on accessible technology. Learn more about accessibility at Surface.

Free accessibility support

Disability Answer Desk—Free support for businesses of any size using Microsoft products.
Learn more
[1] Copilot+ PC experiences vary by device and region and may require updates continuing to roll out through 2025; timing varies. See Copilot Plus PCs Frequently Asked Questions.
  • [2] Sold separately. Software license required for some features.

Choose the right device configuration for you

Shop all Surface for Business devices
Snapdragon® X Plus processors

Surface Pro for Business, Copilot+ PC, 12-inch | Snapdragon

  • Memory: 16 GB or 24 GB (LPDDR5x RAM)
  • Storage:3 256 GB, 512 GB, or 1 TB (UFS)
  • Battery life: Up to 16 hours of local video playback4
  • NPU: Qualcomm® Hexagon™ (45 TOPS)
  • Network: Wi-Fi 75
  • Display: 2196 x 1464, anti-reflective
Configure now
Snapdragon® X Elite or Plus processors

Surface Pro for Business, Copilot+ PC, 13-inch | Snapdragon

  • Memory: 16 GB or 32 GB6 (LPDDR5x RAM)
  • Storage:3 Removable7 solid-state drive (Gen 4 SSD): 256 GB, 512 GB, or 1 TB6
  • Battery life: up to 14 hours of local video playback4
  • NPU: Qualcomm® Hexagon™ (45 TOPS)
  • Network: 5G or Wi-Fi 75
  • Display: 2880 x 1920, optional OLED
Learn more
Intel® Core™ Ultra processors (Series 2)

Surface Pro for Business, Copilot+ PC, 13-inch | Intel

  • Memory: 16 GB or 32 GB (LPDDR5x RAM)
  • Storage:3 Removable7 solid-state drive (Gen 4 SSD): 256 GB, 512 GB, or 1 TB
  • Battery life: up to 14 hours of local video playback4
  • NPU: Intel® AI Boost (40+ TOPS)
  • Network: Wi-Fi 75
  • Display: 2880 x 1920, anti-reflective, optional OLED
Learn more
[1] Copilot+ PC experiences vary by device and region and may require updates continuing to roll out through 2025; timing varies. See Copilot Plus PCs Frequently Asked Questions.
  • [2] Sold separately. Software license required for some features.
  • [3] System software uses significant storage space. Available storage is subject to change based on system software updates and apps usage. 1GB = 1 billion bytes. 1TB = 1,000 GB. See Surface Storage Options more details.
  • [4] Based on video playback test. Battery life varies significantly based on device configuration, usage, network and feature configuration, signal strength, settings and other factors. See Surface Battery Performance for details.
  • [5] 6GHz band not available in all regions.
  • [6] 32GB memory and 1T storage option available for Surface Pro Wi-Fi only models.
  • [7] Solid State Drive (SSD) Retention is only available on Microsoft Surface devices in which the SSD is marketed as removable per the Technical Specifications. Solid State Drive (SSD) Retention is included in both Extended Hardware Service Plus and Microsoft Complete for Business Plus and is also available as an Optional Add-on when purchasing Microsoft Extended Hardware Service and Microsoft Complete for Business. Devices returned to Microsoft with a missing Solid State Drive (SSD) are subject to a Solid State Drive (SSD) replacement fee unless the device is enrolled in the Drive (SSD) Retention offer.
